title: Indulgent Okinawan Mackerel Grill
description: A rich, midnight craving dish featuring wholegrain mustard infused mackerel, grilled to silky perfection and finished with a citrusy splash.
instructions: Preheat a grill or grill pan over medium-high heat.
In a small bowl whisk together wholegrain mustard, soy sauce, mirin, olive oil, grated ginger, minced garlic, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Pat the mackerel fillets dry with paper towels and brush them lightly with the mustard mixture on both sides.
Place the fillets on the preheated grill, skin-side down, and cook for 5 minutes until the skin crisps.
Flip the fillets gently and grill for an additional 3 to 4 minutes, or until the flesh flakes easily with a fork.
Remove the fish from the grill and let it rest for one minute.
Drizzle any remaining sauce over the fillets and squeeze fresh lemon wedges on top.
Serve immediately with a side of steamed vegetables or a light salad.
Enjoy the indulgent, silky texture and midnight craving flavor.
